original_query: SELECT * FROM (SELECT "DEPT"."DEPTNO", "DEPT"."NAME" FROM "DEPT" INNER JOIN (SELECT "DEPTNO" FROM "EMP" GROUP BY "DEPTNO") AS "t0" ON "DEPT"."DEPTNO" = "t0"."DEPTNO") AS "t1" WHERE "t1"."DEPTNO" <= 10
rewritten_query:
SELECT "DEPT"."DEPTNO", "DEPT"."NAME"
FROM "DEPT"
WHERE "DEPT"."DEPTNO" <= 10
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM "EMP"
    WHERE "EMP"."DEPTNO" = "DEPT"."DEPTNO"
);

rewrite_suggestion.produced_suggestion: Replace the INNER JOIN with a subquery using EXISTS to avoid unnecessary grouping and sorting operations
Eliminate nested subqueries and simplify the query structure
Move the filter condition DEPTNO <= 10 to the main query instead of applying it to a derived table
